ddls:
CREATE TABLE "real_estate" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate record */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing units */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the housing units */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the housing units */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population within the geographic area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the households */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Proximity to the ocean */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the property is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data record */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Proximity to the ocean */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the property is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the households */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the area */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the population in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data record */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing units */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the housing units */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the housing units */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condo) */,
  "avg_house_price" REAL /* Average house price in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value for the trend */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Level of confidence in the prediction */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., buyer's market, seller's market) */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Predicted growth rate of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment analysis record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment analysis */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Investment recommendation */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the recommendation */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., rental, flip) */,
  "ROI" REAL /* Predicted return on investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_analysis_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the client (e.g., investor, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client accessing the data */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographic_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
